markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 17. OFFENSES AND PROSECUTION [40000.1 - 41610]
### Chapter 2. Procedure on Arrests [40300 - 40618]
#### Article 2. Release Upon Promise to Appear [40500 - 40522]
##### § 40509.1

If any person has willfully failed to comply with a court order, except a failure to appear, to pay a fine, or to attend traffic violator school, which was issued for a violation of this code, the magistrate or clerk of the court may give notice of the fact to the department.

*(Amended by Stats. 1998, Ch. 877, Sec. 77. Effective January 1, 1999.)*
